current_entries.en_definition: (Abrahamism) A prophet in the Old Testament, Qur'an and Aqdas; a Semitic patriarch son of Terah who practiced monotheism, father of the Jewish patriarch Isaac by Sarah and the Arab patriarch Ishmael by Hagar. [first attested prior to 1150]

examples.english: Abraham Lincoln is a famous person.
examples.chinese: 亚伯拉罕·林肯是名人。

current_entries.en_definition: A en given name. [first attested prior to 1150]
(intransitive) To flee, often secretly; to steal away. [From mid 16th century.]
(transitive, uncommon) To evade, to hide or flee from.
(intransitive) To hide, to be in hiding or concealment.
A state of being away or withdrawn from a place or from companionship

examples.english: How do you account for your absence?
examples.chinese: 你怎麼解釋你缺席的原因？

current_entries.en_definition: Lack; deficiency; non-existence. [First attested around 1350 to 1470.]
Inattention to things present; abstraction (of mind). [First attested in the early 18th century.]
Failure to be present where one is expected, wanted, or needed; nonattendance; deficiency. [First attested around 1350 to 1470.]
(mathematics) For a complex number a+bi, the principal square root of the sum of the squares of its real and imaginary parts, \sqrt{a^2+b^2}. Denoted by vertical bars
An absolving, or setting free from guilt, sin, or penalty; forgiveness of an offense. [First attested around 1350 to 1470.]
(civil, _, legal, obsolete) An acquittal, or sentence of a judge declaring an accused person innocent. [First attested in the early 17th century.]

The act of focusing on one characteristic of an object rather than the object as a whole group of characteristics; the act of separating said qualities from the object or ideas. [First attested in the late 16th century.]

The act of comparing commonality between distinct objects and organizing using those similarities; the act of generalizing characteristics; the product of said generalization. [First attested in the late 16th century.]
That which is absurd; an absurd action; a logical contradiction. [First attested in the late 15th century.]

examples.english: Twitter is a good example of absurdity.
examples.chinese: 推特就是荒谬的绝佳例子。

current_entries.en_definition: The quality of being absurd or inconsistent with obvious truth, reason, or sound judgment. [First attested in the early 16th century.]
Improper treatment or usage; application to a wrong or bad purpose; an unjust, corrupt or wrongful practice or custom. [from around 1350 to 1470]
(transitive) To put to a wrong use; to misapply; to use improperly; to use for a wrong purpose or end; to pervert [from around 1350 to 1470.]
(transitive, archaic) To violate; defile; to rape; (reflexive) to masturbate. [from around 1350 to 1470]
Hell; the bottomless pit; primeval chaos; a confined subterranean ocean. [First attested around 1350 to 1470.]
(frequently, figurative) A bottomless or unfathomed depth, gulf, or chasm; hence, any deep, immeasurable; any void space. [First attested in the late 16th century.]
Moral depravity; vast intellectual or moral depth.
Anything infinite, immeasurable, or profound. [First attested in the late 16th century.]
(collective) The scientific and cultural community engaged in higher education and research, taken as a whole. [from 1956]
Continuous study at higher education institutions; scholarship.
Belonging to an academy or other higher institution of learning, or a scholarly society or organization. [from late 16th century]
(usually, capitalized) A follower of Plato, a Platonist. [First attested in the mid 16th century.]

A senior member of an academy, college, or university; a person who attends an academy; a person engaged in scholarly pursuits; one who is academic in practice. [First attested in the late 16th century.]
An institution for the study of higher learning; a college or a university; typically a private school. [First attested in the mid 16th century.]
A school or place of training in which some special art is taught. [First attested in the late 16th century.]
A society of learned people united for the advancement of the arts and sciences, and literature, or some particular art or science. [First attested in the early 17th century.]
(UK, education) A school directly funded by central government, independent of local control; a charter school.
(obsolete) The knowledge disseminated in an Academy. [Attested from the early 17th century until the mid 18th century.]
(transitive) To cause to move faster; to quicken the motion of; to add to the speed of.

examples.english: The car continued to accelerate.
examples.chinese: 車子繼續加速。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To quicken the natural or ordinary progression or process of.
(intransitive) To become faster; to begin to move more quickly.
The act of accelerating, or the state of being accelerated; increase of motion or action; as opposed to retardation or deceleration.
The amount by which a speed or velocity increases (and so a scalar quantity or a vector quantity).
(physics) The change of velocity with respect to time (can include deceleration or changing direction).
One who, or that which, accelerates.
A device for causing acceleration.
(vehicle) A pedal causing the vehicle to accelerate when it is pressed.
(physics) A device that accelerates charged subatomic particles; a particle accelerator.
(business) A mentoring program for startup companies.
(chemistry) A substance which speeds up chemical reactions.
Easy of access or approach. [from 1640s]

examples.english: Those records are not accessible to the public.
examples.chinese: 這些記錄不對公眾開放。

current_entries.en_definition: (of a person) Easy to get along with.
(art, literature) Easily understood or appreciated. [from 1961]
An unexpected event with negative consequences occurring without the intention of the one suffering the consequences, and (in the strict sense) not directly caused by humans.

examples.english: Did you actually see the accident?
examples.chinese: 你真的看到了這起事故嗎？

current_entries.en_definition: (transportation) A collision or crash of a vehicle, aircraft, or other form of transportation that causes damage to the transportation involved; and sometimes injury or death to the transportation's occupants or bystanders in close proximity. (but see Usage notes)
Happening by chance, or unexpectedly; taking place not according to the usual course of things; by accident, unintentional. [from 16th c.]

examples.english: That discovery was quite accidental.
examples.chinese: 那个发现纯属偶然。

current_entries.en_definition: (painting, pluralonly) Those fortuitous effects produced by luminous rays falling on certain objects so that some parts stand forth in abnormal brightness and other parts are cast into a deep shadow.
(music) A sharp, flat, or natural, occurring not at the commencement of a piece of music as the signature, but before a particular note.
(transitive) To cause to come to agreement; to bring about harmony; to reconcile.

examples.english: The motel can accommodate as many as 400 guests.
examples.chinese: 汽车旅馆可以接待多达400名客人。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To show the correspondence of; to apply or make suit by analogy; to adapt or fit, as teachings to accidental circumstances, statements to facts, etc.
(chiefly, British, usually, a mass noun) Lodging in a dwelling or similar living quarters afforded to travellers in hotels or on cruise ships, or prisoners, etc.
A convenience, a fitting, something satisfying a need.
(music) A part, usually performed by instruments, that gives support or adds to the background in music, or adds for ornamentation; also, the harmony of a figured bass.
That which accompanies; something that attends as a circumstance, or which is added to give greater completeness to the principal thing, or by way of ornament, or for the sake of symmetry.
The act of accomplishing; completion; fulfilment.
Something accomplished; an achievement.
Obliged, when called upon, to answer (for one’s deeds); answerable.
Liable to be called on to render an account.
The act of accusing.
(legal) A formal charge brought against a person in a court of law.
(transitive) To find fault with, blame, censure.

examples.english: Why do you accuse my son?
examples.chinese: 你为什么指责我儿子？

current_entries.en_definition: (intransitive) To make an accusation against someone.
The act of achieving or performing; a successful performance; accomplishment.

examples.english: The moon landing was a monumental achievement.
examples.chinese: 登月是一項里程碑式的成就。

current_entries.en_definition: A great or heroic deed or feat; something accomplished by valor or boldness.

(heraldry) An escutcheon or ensign armorial; a full display or depiction of all the heraldic components to which the bearer of a coat of arms is entitled; (now, especially) a funeral shield: the hatchment.
(video games) An award for completing a particular task or meeting an objective in a video game.
(optics) Free from color; transmitting light without color-related distortion.
Containing components such as achromatic lenses and prisms, designed to prevent color-related distortion.
(biology, of tissue) Uncolored; not absorbing color from a fluid.
(transitive) To admit the knowledge of; to recognize as a fact or truth; to declare one's belief in.

examples.english: You should acknowledge your failure.
examples.chinese: 你应该承认自己的失败。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To own or recognize in a particular quality, character or relationship; to admit the claims or authority of; to give recognition to.
The act of acknowledging
The act of recognizing in a particular character or relationship; recognition of existence, authority, truth, or genuineness.
A reward or other expression or token of gratitude.
An expression of gratitude for a benefit or an obligation.
The act or process of acquiring.
The thing acquired or gained; a gain.
A port city in northern Israel, holiest city in the Baháʼí Faith.
A state of the North Region, Brazil. Capital: Rio Branco.
Any of various similar units of area in other systems.
The state or quality of being active; activeness.

examples.english: Watching TV is a passive activity.
examples.chinese: 看電視是一種被動的活動。

current_entries.en_definition: Something done as an action or a movement.
Something done for pleasure or entertainment, especially one involving movement or an excursion.
(transitive) To make suitable; to make to correspond; to fit or suit.
(transitive) To fit by alteration; to modify or remodel for a different purpose; to adjust.
(transitive) To make by altering or fitting something else; to produce by change of form or character.
(intransitive) To make oneself comfortable to a new thing.
Of, pertaining to, characterized by or showing adaptation; making or made fit or suitable.
(psychology) Of a trait: that helps an individual to function well in society.
Sticky; tenacious, as glutinous substances.
Apt or tending to adhere; clinging.
a substance, such as glue, that provides or promotes adhesion
(transitive) To postpone.
(transitive) To defer; to put off temporarily or indefinitely.
(intransitive, formal, uncommon) To move as a group from one place to another.
The act of administering; government of public affairs; the service rendered, or duties assumed, in conducting affairs; the conducting of any office or employment; direction.

(countable, government, politics) The executive part of government; the persons collectively who are entrusted with the execution of laws and the superintendence of public affairs; the chief magistrate and his cabinet or council; or the council, or ministry, alone, as in Great Britain.
(military) The appointed commander of a navy, regardless of formal title. [1440]
(military) A high rank in the British and American Navies, NATO grade OF-9, equivalent ranks in other navies, in coast guards, etc.
To take (a child, heir, friend, citizen, etc.) by choice into a relationship.

examples.english: If you can't have children, you could always adopt.
examples.chinese: 如果你不能有孩子，你总能领养。

current_entries.en_definition: To take or receive as one's own what is not so naturally.
An adopted son or daughter.
A person who was adopted as a child.
A en given name.
(rare) A en given name (compare Adriana, Adrianna, Adrienne).
A faint sketch; a brief representation, an outline.
(countable, uncountable, figuratively) A rough or symbolic representation; a vague indication of what is to come, a foreshadowing.
(countable, philosophy, specifically phenomenology) The form of an object as seen by an observer.
(grammar) A word that modifies a verb, adjective, other adverbs, or various other types of words, phrases, or clauses.

examples.english: This is an adverb.
examples.chinese: 这是个副词。

current_entries.en_definition: (programming) In the Raku programming language, a named parameter that modifies the behavior of a routine.

(Greek mythology, Roman mythology) A mythological shield associated with the Greek deities Zeus and Athena (and their Roman counterparts Jupiter and Minerva) shown as a short cloak made of goatskin worn on the shoulders, more as an emblem of power and protection than a military shield. The aegis of Athena or Minerva is usually shown with a border of snakes and with the head of Medusa in the center. [from early 17th c.]
(figuratively) Usually as under the aegis: guidance, protection; endorsement, sponsorship.
A natural attraction or feeling of kinship to a person or thing.
A family relationship through marriage of a relative (e.g. sister-in-law), as opposed to consanguinity (e.g. sister).
(chemistry) An attractive force between atoms, or groups of atoms, that contributes towards their forming bonds.
One who exerts power, or has the power to act.

examples.english: In case of an emergency, get in touch with my agent.
examples.chinese: 万一有紧急情况，联系我的代理人。

current_entries.en_definition: One who acts for, or in the place of, another (the principal), by that person's authority; someone entrusted to act on behalf of or in behalf of another, such as to transact business for them.
Someone who works for an intelligence agency: whether an officer or employee thereof or anyone else who agrees to help their efforts (for ideology, for money, as blackmailee, or otherwise).
An active power or cause or substance; something (e.g. biological, chemical, thermal, etc.) that has the power to produce an effect.

(computing) In the client-server model, the part of the system that performs information preparation and exchange on behalf of a client or server. Especially in the phrase “intelligent agent” it implies some kind of autonomous process which can communicate with other agents to perform some collective task on behalf of one or more humans.
Characterized by aggression; highly combative; prone to behave in a way that involves attacking (especially if unjustly) or arguing.
(pathology, of a tumour or disease) That spreads quickly or extensively; virulent; malignant.
Extreme pain.
(Dated) Violent contest or striving.
The last struggle of life; death struggle.
(AI, countable, and, uncountable) Initialism of artificial intelligence.

examples.english: Ai finds it difficult to make friends with Ken.
examples.chinese: 艾发现和开恩交朋友很难。

current_entries.en_definition: (by extension, countable) A specific artificial intelligence program, such as the chatbot ChatGPT.
The point intended to be hit, or object intended to be attained or affected.

examples.english: That aim is impossible to attain.
examples.chinese: 那個目標是無法達成的。

current_entries.en_definition: Intention or goal.
(transitive) To direct or point (e.g. a weapon), at a particular object; to direct, as a missile, an act, or a proceeding, at, to, or against an object

(politics, aviation) A specified portion of the atmosphere, especially that under the technical aviation control and/or jurisdiction of a particular state over which territory (and territorial waters) it lies.
(aviation) that part of the sky designated for the sole use of aircraft.
A department of Hauts-de-France, France. Capital: Laon (INSEE code 02).
A left tributary of the Oise, flowing through the departments of Meuse, Marne, Ardennes, Aisne and Oise, in northeastern France.
A state of the United States, formerly a territory. Capital: Juneau. Largest city: Anchorage. Postal code: AK.
Several places in the United States, named for the state or territory.
Any of various large seabirds of the family Diomedeidae ranging widely in the Southern Ocean and the North Pacific and having a hooked beak and long narrow wings.
(golf) A double eagle, or three under par on any one hole, except a par 3 hole.
(historical) In Ancient Rome, a white tablet or register on which the praetor's edicts and other public notices were recorded.

examples.english: Damon showed me his stamp album.
examples.chinese: 戴蒙給我看了他的郵票冊。

current_entries.en_definition: A book specially designed to keep photographs, stamps, or autographs.
A phonograph record that is composed of several tracks
A jacket or cover for such a phonograph record.
A group of audio recordings, on any medium, intended for distribution as a group.

The premodern and early modern study of physical changes, particularly in Europe, Arabia, and China; and chiefly in pursuit of an elixir of immortality, a universal panacea, and/or a philosopher's stone able to transmute base metals into gold, eventually developing into chemistry.
The causing of any sort of mysterious sudden transmutation.
Former name of Khujand: a city in Tajikistan.
Former name of Mary: a city in Turkmenistan.
A city in Clark County, Missouri.
A city in Monroe Township, Madison County, Indiana.
A former town in the United Counties of Stormont, Dundas and Glengarry, Ontario, Canada; now a part of the township of North Glengarry.
A city in Teleorman County, Romania.
(uncountable, mathematics) Elementary algebra: A system for representing and manipulating unknown quantities (variables) in equations.

examples.english: Many pupils are poor at algebra.
examples.chinese: 很多小学生学不好代数。

current_entries.en_definition: (countable, mathematics, algebra) Any of several objects of study in Algebra
(uncountable, medicine, historical, rare) The surgical treatment of a dislocated or fractured bone. Also (countable) : a dislocation or fracture.

A collection of ordered steps that solve a mathematical problem. A precise step-by-step plan for a computational procedure that possibly begins with an input value and yields an output value in a finite number of steps.
(loosely) A flowchart illustrating a decision-making process for human users, especially health care professionals.
Used as a friendly or respectful salutation to acclaim, greet, or welcome someone: (I wish you) all health or good fortune!
Chiefly followed by to (someone or something): used as a salutation to indicate that someone or something is respected or welcome.
Using every available means.
Covering all aspects without exception.
Of or pertaining to allergy.

examples.english: He is allergic to house dust.
examples.chinese: 他對室內灰塵過敏。

current_entries.en_definition: Having an allergy.

(medicine, immunology, broadly) A disorder of the immune system causing adverse reactions to substances (allergens) not harmful to most and marked by the body's production of histamines and associated with atopy, anaphylaxis, and asthma; any condition of hypersensitivity to a substance.

examples.english: I have an allergy to milk.
examples.chinese: 我對牛奶過敏。

current_entries.en_definition: (medicine, immunology, strictly) Specifically, hypersensitivity of class I in the modern classification thereof: the immunoglobulin E–mediated type.
(informal, figuratively) An antipathy, as toward a person or activity.
(in the plural) The resins of the tree Aquilaria malaccensis (syn. Aquilaria agallocha), known for their fragrant aroma, produced after infection by the fungus Phialophora parasitica.
Any plant of the large and variable genus Aloe.
(pathology) Deficiency of the hair, which may be caused by failure to grow or loss after growth.
(medicine) Loss of hair (especially on the head) or loss of wool or feathers, whether natural or caused by disease.
The set of letters used when writing in a language.

examples.english: The English alphabet has 26 letters.
examples.chinese: 英文有二十六個字母。

current_entries.en_definition: A writing system in which letters represent phonemes. (Contrast e.g. logography, a writing system in which each character represents a word, and syllabary, in which each character represents a syllable.)
An amorphous movement of right-wing white nationalists opposed to multiculturalism and egalitarianism by race and sex, mostly active on the Internet.
(countable, rare) A member of the alt-right; an alt-righter.
An angry or heated dispute.
Angry or heated disputation.
The absolute height of a location, usually measured from sea level.
(geometry) The distance measured perpendicularly from a figure's vertex to the opposite side of the vertex.
(astronomy) The angular distance of a heavenly body above our Earth's horizon.
Regard for others, both natural and moral without regard for oneself; devotion to the interests of others; brotherly kindness.
(biology, sociobiology) Action or behaviour that benefits another or others at some cost to the performer.
A male pupil or student.
A student of any gender.
One employed to take dictation, or copy manuscripts.
A clerk, secretary or stenographer, or scribe.
Any of various herbs of the genus Amaranthus.
The characteristic purplish-red colour of the flowers or leaves of these plants.
(cooking) The seed of these plants, used as a cereal.
A diplomat of the highest rank sent to a foreign court to represent there their sovereign or country. (Sometimes called ambassador-in-residence)

examples.english: The English ambassador demanded to meet with the President directly.
examples.chinese: 英国大使要求直接会见总统。

current_entries.en_definition: An official messenger and representative.
Encompassing on all sides; surrounding; encircling; enveloping.
(music) Evoking or creating an atmosphere: atmospheric.
Something that surrounds; encompassing material, substance or shape.
(biblical) Certainly; verily.
At the end of religious prayers: so be it.
(colloquial) Used to indicate emphatic agreement.

(organic chemistry) Any derivative of an oxoacid in which the hydroxyl group has been replaced with an amino or substituted amino group; especially such derivatives of a carboxylic acid, the carboxamides or acid amides
(inorganic chemistry) Any ionic derivative of ammonia in which a hydrogen atom has been replaced with a metal cation (R-NH- or R2N-)
(amino acid) Any organic compound containing both an amino and a carboxylic acid functional group.

(amino acid) Any of the twenty naturally occurring α-amino acids (having the amino, and carboxylic acid groups on the same carbon atom), and a variety of side chains, that combine, via peptide bonds, to form proteins.
The capital city of Jordan.
A governorate of Jordan around the capital.
Capable of functioning on land or in water.
Occurring on both land and water.
(transitive) To render larger, more extended, or more intense.
(transitive) To increase the amplitude of something, especially of an electric current.
The measure of the size of something, especially its width or breadth; largeness, magnitude.
(mathematics) The maximum absolute value of the vertical component of a curve or function, especially one that is periodic.
(physics) The maximum absolute value of some quantity that varies.
Entertaining.

examples.english: The story was amusing.
examples.chinese: 故事很有趣。

current_entries.en_definition: Funny, hilarious.
Decomposition into components in order to study (a complex thing, concept, theory, etc.).

examples.chinese: 我們要詳細的分析一下意外發生的前因後果。

current_entries.en_definition: (uncountable, mathematics) A broad field of study in modern mathematics (often mentioned alongside algebra) which developed out of the calculus, concerned with the behavior of functions, sequences, series, limits, metric spaces, measures and more.
(countable, analytical chemistry, physical chemistry) The process of breaking down a substance into its constituent parts, or the result of this process.
Someone who analyzes.

examples.chinese: 汤姆是一名金融分析师。

current_entries.en_definition: A mathematician who studies real analysis.
Of, or relating to any form of analysis, or to analytics.
Of, or relating to division into elements or principles.
(mathematics) Of, or relating to algebra or a similar method of analysis.
(analysis) Being defined in terms of objects of differential calculus such as derivatives.
(linguistics) Of a language, having a grammar principally dependent on the arrangement of uninflected function words within sentences to indicate meaning. Compare synthetic.
A en given name.
The first Apostle in the New Testament.
An account which supports an argument, but which is not supported by scientific or statistical analysis.
A previously untold secret account of an incident.
An incorporeal and holy or semidivine messenger from a deity or other divine entity, traditionally depicted as a youthful, winged figure in flowing robes.

examples.english: You're an angel!
examples.chinese: 你真是个天使！

current_entries.en_definition: (Abrahamic, _, religion) One of the lowest order of such beings, below virtues.
(figuratively) A person having qualities traditionally attributed to angels.
Someone who is kind or selfless.
(theater) The person who funds a show.
Having little or no water.
(physical chemistry) Having no water of crystallization.

(linguistics) conversion from the inanimate to animate grammatical category
An artistic style originating in, and associated with, Japanese animation, and that has also been adopted by a comparatively low number of animated works from other countries.

examples.english: The common language of many anime is subtitles.
examples.chinese: 許多動畫的共同語言是字幕。

current_entries.en_definition: An animated work that originated in Japan, regardless of the artistic style.
An act of announcing, or giving notice.
That which conveys what is announced.
The content which is announced.
That which annoys.
An act or instance of annoying.
The psychological state of being annoyed or irritated.
(pharmaceutical effect) Tending to destroy or capable of destroying microbes.

(pharmaceutical effect) Preventing or counteracting the pathogenic action of microbes.
An agent (drug or other substance) that destroys microbes (i.e., kills off a population of them).
The period of Ancient Greece and Ancient Rome.
Ancient times; faraway history; former ages.
The people of ancient times.
(history) The historical period preceding the Middle Ages (c. 500-1500), primarily relating to European history.
(often, constructed as an uncountable plural) A relic or monument of ancient times, such as a coin, a statue, etc.; an ancient institution.
The largest city and provincial capital of the province of Antwerp, Belgium.
A district of the city of Antwerp, province of Antwerp, Belgium.
A heavy iron block used in the blacksmithing trade as a surface upon which metal can be struck and shaped.
(skeleton) The incus bone in the middle ear.
An unpleasant state of mental uneasiness, nervousness, apprehension and obsession or concern about some uncertain event.
(pathology) A state of restlessness and agitation, often accompanied by a distressing sense of oppression or tightness in the stomach.

examples.english: I think that you ought to apologize to her.

current_entries.en_definition: (intransitive, dated) To make an apologia or defense; to act as apologist.
A short story with a moral, often involving talking animals or objects; a fable.
(rhetoric) The use of fable to persuade the audience.
The renunciation of a belief or set of beliefs.
Specifically, the renunciation of one's religion or faith.
(Christianity) Any of the group of twelve disciples chosen by Jesus to preach and spread the Gospel.
A missionary, or leader of a religious mission, especially one in the early Christian Church (but see Apostle).
A complex machine or instrument.
A bureaucratic organization, especially one influenced by political patronage.
To make quiet; to calm; to reduce to a state of peace; to dispel (anger or hatred).
To come to terms with; to adapt to the demands of.
Any strong desire; an eagerness or longing.

examples.english: Thanks to you I've lost my appetite.
examples.chinese: 多亏你我胃口都没了。

A fair valuation or estimate of merit, worth, weight, etc.; recognition of excellence; gratitude and esteem.
A rise in value.
(transitive) To officially sanction; to ratify; to confirm; to set as satisfactory.

examples.english: I approve of your plan.
examples.chinese: 我贊成你的計劃。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive, archaic) To make proof of; to demonstrate; to prove or show practically.
(intransitive, followed by "of") To consider worthy (to); to be pleased (with); to accept.
(transitive) To regard as good; to commend; to be pleased with; to think well of.
(aviation) The paved area of an airport, especially the area where aircraft park away from a terminal.

examples.english: Tom put on an apron.
examples.chinese: 湯姆穿上了一條圍裙。

current_entries.en_definition: The loading, parking or roadway area immediately beside a railway station or marine terminal.
The bluish-green colour of the sea.
A transparent bluish-green, sometimes yellow-green, variety of beryl.
An artificial channel that is constructed to convey water from one location to another.
A structure carrying water over a river or depression, especially an ancient structure.
Related to Arabia.
A native of Arabia.
An Arabian horse.
A number represented using an Indian and Arabic system involving the symbols 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, and 0, representing digits. [1727]
(in the plural) The system using such numerals, now employed throughout the world.
Of or characterized by antiquity; old-fashioned, quaint, antiquated.
(archaeology) Belonging to the archaic period.
A professional who designs buildings or other structures, or who prepares plans and superintends construction.

examples.english: Despite adversity, the architect achieved worldwide fame.
examples.chinese: 尽管有逆境，建筑师还是获得了享誉全球的荣誉。

current_entries.en_definition: A person who plans, devises or contrives the achievement of a desired result.
A department of Grand Est, France. Capital: Charleville-Mézières (INSEE code 08).
forest, geographic region and low mountain range in France, Belgium, Germany and Luxembourg; in full, Ardennes Forest, Ardenne Forest, or Forest of Ardennes.

An enclosed area, often outdoor, for the presentation of sporting events (sports arena) or other spectacular events; earthen area, often oval, specifically for rodeos (North America) or circular area for bullfights (especially Hispanic America).
The building housing such an area; specifically, a very large, often round building, often topped with a dome, designated for indoor sporting or other major events, such as concerts.
(historical) The sand-covered centre of an amphitheatre where contests were held in Ancient Rome.
A realm in which events take place; an area of interest, study, behaviour, etc.
A province of Tuscany, Italy.
The capital city of Arezzo.
(countable, also, figuratively) A fact or statement used to support a proposition; a reason.

examples.english: The argument ended in a fight.
examples.chinese: 讨论最后变成了打架。

current_entries.en_definition: The independent variable of a function.
A value, or a reference to a value, passed to a function.
The subject matter of an artistic representation, discourse, or writing; a theme or topic.
Someone with an Aries star sign.
(zodiac constellations) A constellation of the zodiac supposedly shaped like a ram.
(astrology) The zodiac sign for the ram, ruled by Mars and covering March 20 – April 20 (tropical astrology) or April 15 – May 15 (sidereal astrology).
The nobility, or the hereditary ruling class.
Government by such a class, or a state with such a government.
A class of people considered (not normally universally) superior to others.
(Judaism, Christianity, Islam) Noah's ark: the ship built by Noah to save his family and a collection of animals from the deluge.
(Judaism) A decorated cabinet at the front of a synagogue, in which Torah scrolls are kept.
(of a person, specifically) Equipped with a gun.

examples.english: The armed forces occupied the entire territory.
examples.chinese: 军队占领了整片领土。

current_entries.en_definition: (sometimes, in combination) Equipped, especially with a weapon.
The governmental agency in charge of a state's army.

examples.english: The town was defended by a large army.
examples.chinese: 城市由一支大军守卫。

current_entries.en_definition: (figuratively) A large group of people working toward the same purpose.
(Commonwealth, mildly, vulgar) The anus.
(Commonwealth, mildly, vulgar, offensive, or, derogatory) An inconsiderate, mean-spirited, or otherwise contemptible person. (Less offensive than fucker or cunt.)
Something viewed as a product of human agency or conception rather than an inherent element.

A finding or structure in an experiment or investigation that is not a true feature of the object under observation, but is a result of external action, the test arrangement, or an experimental error.
(software engineering) Ellipsis of build artifact.
Man-made; made by humans; of artifice.

examples.english: It's an artificial flower.
examples.chinese: 這是朵人造花。

current_entries.en_definition: Not natural or normal: imposed arbitrarily or without regard to the specifics or normal circumstances of a person, a situation, etc.
(bridge) Conveying some meaning other than the actual contents of one's hand.
A person who creates art as an occupation.

examples.english: Picasso is a famous artist.
examples.chinese: 毕加索是个有名的艺术家。

current_entries.en_definition: A person who creates art.
(often, in combination) A person who is skilled at some activity.
Any specific feature, part, or element of something.

examples.english: Imagination affects every aspect of our lives.
examples.chinese: 想像力影响着我们生活的各个方面。

current_entries.en_definition: (grammar) A grammatical quality of a verb which determines the relationship of the speaker to the internal temporal flow of the event which the verb describes, or whether the speaker views the event from outside as a whole, or from within as it is unfolding. [from 19th c.]
Loss of consciousness due to the body's inability to deliver oxygen to its tissues, either by the breathing of air lacking oxygen or by the inability of the blood to carry oxygen.

(medicine, obsolete) A condition in which an extreme decrease in the concentration of oxygen in the body leads to loss of consciousness or death. Replaced in the mid-20th century by the more specific terms anoxia, hypoxia, hypoxemia and hypercapnia.
(historical, , usually, capitalized) A member of the Nizari Ismaili Muslim community of the Alamut Period.
Someone who intentionally kills a person, especially a professional who kills a public or political figure.
Any ruthless killer.
The process of assembling or bringing together.
A collection of things which have been gathered together or assembled.
(archaeology) A group of different artifacts found in association with one another.
(transitive) To put together.
(ergative) To gather as a group.
(vulgar) The anus.
(vulgar, derogatory, or, offensive, synecdochically) A jerk; an inappropriately or objectionably mean, inconsiderate, contemptible, obnoxious, intrusive, stupid, or rude person.
The act of assimilating or the state of being assimilated.
The metabolic conversion of nutrients into tissue.
(phonology) A sound change process by which the phonetics of a speech segment becomes more like that of another segment in a word (or at a word boundary), so that a change of phoneme occurs.
(transitive) To lessen the intensity of, to mitigate or relieve (hunger, emotion, pain, etc.).
(transitive) To pacify or soothe (someone).
To authenticate by means of belief; to surmise; to suppose to be true, especially without proof
To adopt (an idea or cause)
To take on a position, duty or form
The act of taking for granted, or supposing a thing without proof; a supposition; an unwarrantable claim.
The thing supposed; a postulate, or proposition assumed; a supposition.
The state of being assured; total confidence or trust; a lack of doubt; certainty; guarantee.
Firmness of mind; undoubting steadiness; intrepidity, courage, or self-confidence.

(insurance) Insurance; a contract for the payment of a sum on occasion of a certain event, as loss or death. Assurance is used in relation to life contingencies, and insurance in relation to other contingencies. It is called temporary assurance, in the time within which the contingent event must happen is limited.

CE
Asturias: A former kingdom existing from c. 718 to 924 

CE, in modern northwest Spain and Portugal
(archaic) Asturias
Overlapping or coinciding in duration.
(sentence adverb) On the other hand (introducing an opposing viewpoint).
(broadly) A lack of belief in deities, or a belief that there is insufficient evidence to believe in a god.
(narrowly) Belief that no deities exist (sometimes including rejection of other religious beliefs).
(sports, especially, _, Britain) A group of sporting activities including track and field, road running, cross country and racewalking.
(sports, especially, _, US) Physical activities such as sports and games requiring stamina, fitness and skill.
The gases surrounding the Earth or any astronomical body.

examples.english: This place has a mysterious atmosphere.
examples.chinese: 这个地方有一种神秘的气氛。

current_entries.en_definition: The air in a particular place.
A unit of measurement for pressure equal to 101325 Pa (symbol: atm), approximately the atmospheric pressure at sea level.
(chemistry, physics) The smallest possible amount of matter which still retains its identity as a chemical element, now known to consist of a nucleus surrounded by electrons. [from 16th c.]

examples.english: A water molecule has two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.
examples.chinese: 一個水分子是由兩個氫原子和一個氧原子組成的。

current_entries.en_definition: (history of science) A hypothetical particle posited by Greek philosophers as an ultimate and indivisible component of matter. [from 15th c.]
(physics, chemistry) Of or relating to atoms; composed of atoms; monatomic.

examples.english: We are in the era of atomic energy.
examples.chinese: 我們身在原子能時代。

current_entries.en_definition: Employing or relating to nuclear energy or processes.
Unable to be split or made any smaller.
(computing, of an operation) Guaranteed to complete either fully or not at all while waiting in a pause, and running synchronously when called by multiple asynchronous threads.
(military) Used as a command to bring soldiers to the attention position.

examples.english: You must pay attention to his advice.
examples.chinese: 你一定要注意他的建议。

current_entries.en_definition: Mental focus.
An action or remark expressing concern for or interest in someone or something, especially romantic interest.
(uncountable, military) A state of alertness in the standing position.
A thing that serves to bear witness, confirm, or authenticate; validation, verification, documentation.
(linguistics, of a language, word, word form, or word meaning) An appearance in print or otherwise recorded on a permanent medium.
The position of the body or way of carrying oneself.

examples.english: Try to have a positive attitude about everything.
examples.chinese: 试着用积极的态度去面对任何事情。

current_entries.en_definition: (figurative) Disposition or state of mind.
Causing attraction; having the quality of attracting by inherent force.

examples.english: Mary has as attractive a personality as her sister.
examples.chinese: 玛丽性格很好，就像她姐姐一样。

current_entries.en_definition: Having the power of charming or alluring by agreeable qualities; enticing.
Pleasing or appealing to the senses, especially of a potential romantic partner.
A department of Grand Est, France (INSEE code 10).
A right tributary of the Seine in the departments of Haute-Marne, Côte-d'Or, Aube and Marne in northeastern France.
A department of Occitania, France. Capital: Carcassonne.
A river in the departments of Pyrénées-Orientales, Hérault, Aude and Ariège, Occitania, France.
A group of people within hearing; specifically, a large gathering of people listening to or watching a performance, speech, etc. [from 15th c.]
The readership of a book or other written publication. [from 19th c.]
A en given name.
(very, rare) A en given name.
A city in Poland, also called Oświęcim.
A former concentration camp in what is now Poland; used metonymically for Nazi evil, the Holocaust.
Severity of manners or life; extreme rigor or strictness; harsh discipline.
(economics) A policy of deficit-cutting, which by definition requires lower spending, higher taxes, or both.
(obsolete) Sourness and harshness to the taste.

A country consisting of a main island, the island of Tasmania and other smaller islands, located in Oceania; historically, a collection of former colonies of the British Empire. Official name: Commonwealth of Australia. Capital: Canberra.
(geology) A continent consisting of the land on the Australian tectonic plate, i.e. Australia, New Guinea and intervening islands.
Power or right to make or enforce rules, give orders, or impose obligation; or a position having such power or right.
A reliable, definitive source of information on a subject.

(clinical psychology) A pervasive neurological condition that is observable in early childhood and persists throughout the lifespan, characterised by atypical communication patterns (e.g., differences in body language or eye contact), delayed language development, and sensory processing sensitivities.
(clinical psychology, obsolete) A diagnosis involving a pathological tendency to engage in self-centered fantasy thinking, historically considered a symptom of insanity or schizophrenia.
(road transport, dated) A motorbus, as opposed to earlier horse-drawn buses.
(by extension, cycle racing) A large group of cyclists who have fallen behind the peloton in a race.
Excessive or inordinate desire of gain; greed for wealth
Inordinate desire for some supposed good.
(transitive) To try not to meet or communicate with (a person); to shun.
(transitive) To keep away from; to keep clear of; to stay away from.
(transitive) To try not to do something or to have something happen.
(transitive) To cause to become awake.

examples.english: This book will awaken your imagination.
examples.chinese: 這本書會讓你發揮想像力。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive, figurative) To cause to become aware.
The state or level of consciousness where sense data can be confirmed by an observer.

examples.english: Developing political awareness takes time.
examples.chinese: 培养政治意识要花费时间。

current_entries.en_definition: The state or quality of being aware of something.
(philosophy) A seemingly self-evident or necessary truth which is based on assumption; a principle or proposition which cannot actually be proved or disproved.

(logic, mathematics, proof theory) A fundamental assumption that serves as a basis for deduction of theorems; a postulate (sometimes distinguished from postulates as being universally applicable, whereas postulates are particular to a certain science or context).
The series of vertebrae, separated by disks, that encloses and protects the spinal cord, and runs down the middle of the back in vertebrate animals.
(countable, figuratively) Any fundamental support, structure, or infrastructure.
(uncountable, figuratively) Courage, fortitude, or strength.

A piece of excavating equipment, either an integral subassembly or an attachment, consisting of a digging bucket or scoop on the end of an articulated arm, drawn backwards to move earth; used in excavator/digger and backhoe tractors.

(chiefly, US, Canada, Australia) Ellipsis of backhoe loader: A multi-purpose tractor with a front-mounted loading bucket and a rear-mounted digging bucket. The tractor combines a front-end loader/loader (component) and an excavator/digger (component).
A peninsula in Mexico: A mountainous peninsula of western Mexico between the Pacific Ocean and the Gulf of California; administered as the states of Baja California and Baja California Sur.
A state of Mexico that occupies the northern part of the peninsula.
(transitive, or, intransitive, or, ditransitive, with person as subject) To cook (something) in an oven (for someone).
(intransitive, with baked thing as subject) To be cooked in an oven.
(accounting) A list accounting for the debits on one side, and for the credits on the other.
(accounting) The result of such a procedure; the difference between credit and debit of an account.
(transitive) To bring (items) to an equipoise, as the scales of a balance by adjusting the weights.
A kind of narrative poem, adapted for recitation or singing; especially, a sentimental or romantic poem in short stanzas.
A slow romantic song.
(dances) A classical form of dance.
A theatrical presentation of such dancing, usually with music, sometimes in the form of a story.

A region on the Iranian plateau in south-western Asia, northwest of the Arabian Sea, dominated by desert and mountains, composed of southwestern Pakistan, southeastern Iran and a strip of southwestern Afghanistan; inhabited by the Baloch people.
A province of Pakistan. Capital: Quetta.
Common in a boring way, to the point of being predictable; containing nothing new or fresh.
(uncommon, historical) Relating to a type of feudal jurisdiction or service.
(North America, UK, Ireland) In particular, the sweet, yellow fruit of the Cavendish banana cultivar, which may be eaten raw, as distinct from e.g. a plantain for cooking.

examples.english: Have you ever eaten a banana pie?
examples.chinese: 你吃过香蕉派吗？

current_entries.en_definition: An elongated curved tropical fruit of a banana plant, which grows in bunches and has a creamy flesh and a smooth skin. [from 1597]
One who robs others in a lawless area, especially as part of a group.
An outlaw.
(of a signal) The width of the smallest frequency band within which the signal can fit.
(networking, informal) The rate of data flow in digital networks typically measured in bits per second; the bitrate.
Exceptional; very good.
A flag or standard used by a military commander, monarch or nation.
(by extension) The military unit under such a flag or standard.
A large piece of cloth with a slogan, motto, or emblem carried in a demonstration or other procession or suspended in some conspicuous place.
(by extension, figurative) A cause or purpose; a campaign or movement.
(heraldry) The principal standard of a knight.
(Internet, television) A type of advertisement on a web page or on television, usually taking the form of a graphic or animation above or alongside the content.
Relating to people, countries, or customs perceived as uncivilized or inferior.

An uncivilized or uncultured person, originally compared to the hellenistic Greco-Roman civilisation; usually associated with senseless violence and self-harm or other such shows of brute force and lack of mental faculty.
(derogatory) Someone from a developing country or backward culture.

A brutish warrior depicted in sword and sorcery and other fantasy works; typically clad in primitive furs or leather and usually favoring physical strength over intelligence while often possessing a bellicose temperament and disdain for laws.
An Apostle, identified with Nathanael. (biblical character)
A en given name of biblical origin.
The capital city of Basel-Stadt canton, Switzerland.
A former canton in northwestern Switzerland.
A en given name, in quiet but steady use in the UK.
A plant (Ocimum basilicum).
The leaves of this plant used as a herb.
(heraldiccharge) A type of dragon used in heraldry.
Any tree-dwelling lizard of the genus Basiliscus: the basilisk lizard.
(artillery) A type of large brass cannon.
Any flying mammal of the order Chiroptera, usually small and nocturnal, insectivorous or frugivorous.
A club made of wood or aluminium used for striking the ball in sports such as baseball, softball and cricket.
(intransitive) To take a turn at hitting a ball with a bat in sports like cricket, baseball and softball, as opposed to fielding.
A borough in Pennsylvania; named for the city in England.

examples.english: I'm going to take a bath.
examples.chinese: 我打算洗个澡。

current_entries.en_definition: A town and mineral spring in Saint Thomas parish, Jamaica; named for the city in England.
A tub or pool which is used for bathing: bathtub.
A building or area where bathing occurs.
The act of bathing; an instance of this; the taking of a bath.
(transitive, Commonwealth) To wash a person or animal in a bath.
(military) A general action, fight, or encounter, in which all the divisions of an army are or may be engaged; a combat, an engagement.

examples.english: We won the battle.
examples.chinese: 我们战争胜利了。

current_entries.en_definition: (military, now, rare) A division of an army; a battalion.
(military, obsolete) The main body of an army, as distinct from the vanguard and rear; the battalia.
(intransitive) To join in battle; to contend in fight
(especially, of horses) Of a reddish-brown colour.

examples.english: We were granted the privilege of fishing in this bay.
examples.chinese: 我们得到了在这个海湾内捕鱼的特权。

current_entries.en_definition: (geography) A body of water (especially the sea) contained by a concave shoreline.
Laurus nobilis, a tree or shrub of the family Lauraceae, having dark green leaves and berries.
Bay leaf, the leaf of this or certain other species of tree or shrub, used as a herb.
The excited howling of dogs when hunting or being attacked.
(transitive) To bark at; hence, to follow with barking; to bring or drive to bay.
(idiomatic) To treat a topic, but omit its main points, often intentionally.
(idiomatic) To delay or avoid talking about something difficult or unpleasant.
A man-made structure in which honey bees are kept so that humans can harvest their honey.
Such a home prepared by the bees themselves, in which some species of honey bees live and raise their young.
A women's hairstyle, popular in the 1960s, in which long hair is styled into a hive-shaped form on top of the head and usually held in place with lacquer.
An alcoholic drink fermented from starch material, commonly barley malt; often with hops or some other substance (like gruit) to impart a bitter flavor.

examples.english: I went to drink a beer with friends.
examples.chinese: 我去和朋友喝了杯啤酒。

current_entries.en_definition: A glass, bottle, or can of any of the above beverages.
Beta vulgaris, a plant with a swollen root which is eaten or used to make sugar.

examples.english: It's not blood. It's beet.
examples.chinese: 这不是血。这是甜菜。

current_entries.en_definition: (US, Canada) A beetroot; a swollen root of such a plant used as a culinary vegetable.
The way a living creature behaves or acts generally.
The way a device or system operates.
A direct-administered municipality, the capital city of China. [from c. 1958]

examples.english: Beijing is the capital of China.
examples.chinese: 北京是中国的首都。

current_entries.en_definition: (metonymy) The government of the People's Republic of China. [from c. 1949]
A province of Veneto, Italy.
A town and comune, the capital of the province of Belluno, Veneto.
A federal city of Switzerland; the capital city of Bern canton.

examples.english: Bern is the capital of Switzerland.
examples.chinese: 伯恩是瑞士首都。

current_entries.en_definition: A canton of Switzerland.

examples.english: Besides the rain, we experienced heavy winds.
examples.chinese: 除了雨之外，我们体验了强风。

current_entries.en_definition: (conjunctive) Used to emphasize an additional point, especially an important or stronger reason; moreover; furthermore.
In addition to.
Other than; except for; instead of.

examples.english: Please don't do anything that would besmirch the Matsuno family name!
examples.chinese: 请不要做任何有损松野家族名声的事！

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To tarnish something, especially someone's reputation.
To apply or make use of (someone or something); to employ, to use.
To impart (something) gratuitously; to present (something) to someone or something, especially as a gift or an honour; to confer, to give, to accord; to render.
A wager, an agreement between two parties that a stake (usually money) will be paid by the loser to the winner (the winner being the one who correctly forecast the outcome of an event).
(transitive, ditransitive) To stake or pledge upon the outcome of an event; to wager.
(transitive) To be sure of something; to be able to count on something.
A city in Northampton County and Lehigh County, Pennsylvania.
A quarter of Bümpliz-Oberbottigen, city of Bern, Switzerland.
(transitive) Often used in a prediction (chiefly in woe betide) or a wish: to happen to (someone or something); to befall.
(intransitive) Chiefly in the third person: to happen; to take place; to bechance, to befall.
(transitive) To deliver into the hands of an enemy by treachery or fraud, in violation of trust; to give up treacherously or faithlessly.
(transitive) To prove faithless or treacherous to, as to a trust or one who trusts; to be false to; to deceive.
(transitive) To violate the confidence of, by disclosing a secret, or that which one is bound in honor not to make known.
Of or relating to the Bible.
In accordance with the teachings of the Bible (according to some interpretation of it).
A section of a written work containing citations, not quotations, to all the books referred to in the work.

examples.english: Hand in a bibliography of your sources.

current_entries.en_definition: A list of books or documents relevant to a particular subject or author.

examples.english: Your bike is better than mine.
examples.chinese: 你的自行车比我的好。

current_entries.en_definition: Clipping of motorbike.
(slang, derogatory) Ellipsis of village bike.
Any vehicle sharing some characteristics with a bicycle or motorbike, such as pedal power, a handlebar, or a saddle.
(intransitive) To ride a bike.
A bitter brownish-yellow or greenish-yellow secretion produced by the liver, stored in the gall bladder, and discharged into the duodenum where it aids the process of digestion.
Bitterness of temper; ill humour; irascibility.
Of or relating to biology.
Related by consanguinity, especially as to parents and children.
The total mass of all, or a specified category of, living things within a specific area, habitat, etc.

Organic matter from living things which were recently alive (especially vegetation) used as a fuel or source of energy, especially if cultivated for that purpose; also, fuel produced from such organic matter; biofuel.
The use of living organisms (especially microorganisms) in industrial, agricultural, medical and other technological applications.
The application of the principles and practices of engineering and technology to the life sciences.
A major city and metropolitan borough in the West Midlands, England, historically in Warwickshire with a population of over one million.

examples.english: The train for Birmingham leaves from platform 3.
examples.chinese: 去伯明翰的火车从3号站台出发。

current_entries.en_definition: A city in Oakland County, Michigan.
A community in the city of Derby, New Haven County, Connecticut.
A cake, often iced and decorated, made to celebrate a person's birthday.

In particular, a buttery, frosted vanilla cake of the sort commonly made to celebrate birthdays in the US, used in compound words to attribute a buttery or creamy, sugary, vanilla cake flavour or aroma to other things.
(UK, Australia, Ireland, New Zealand, sometimes, Canada, rare) A small, flat, baked good which is either hard and crisp or else soft but firm; a cookie.

examples.english: Mum, can I have a biscuit? "No, you shouldn't eat between meals."
examples.chinese: 妈妈，我能吃一块饼干吗？ "不行，不该在3餐间吃。"

current_entries.en_definition: (especially, nautical) Any of several hard bread or breadlike foodstuffs, especially those formerly supplied to naval ships and armies, made with very little water, kneaded into flat cakes, and slowly baked, and which often became infested with weevils.
A form of unglazed earthenware.
(of humans or other animals) The state of being sexually attracted to members of either sex.
(chiefly, botany) The state of being .
Causing a stinging sensation.

examples.english: I was biting my nails, worrying about you.
examples.chinese: 我一面咬著指甲一面擔心著你。

current_entries.en_definition: Cutting or incisive.
Tending to bite.
(informal, aviation) A flight recorder; the brightly colored cockpit voice recorders and flight data recorders in an aircraft designed to aid in determining the cause of an accident.
A theoretical construct or device with known input and output characteristics but unknown method of operation.
Cygnus atratus, a swan with black plumage and a red bill which is endemic to Australia. [from c. 1700]
Something believed impossible or not to exist, especially if an example is subsequently found; also, something extremely rare; a rara avis.
Any of several species of venomous and potentially deadly spiders, particularly Latrodectus spp.
A woman who kills one or more of her lovers.
A village in Kindrashivka rural hromada, Kupiansk Raion, Kharkiv Oblast, Ukraine, founded in 1888.
A village in Kalynivske settlement hromada, Beryslav Raion, Kherson Oblast, Ukraine.
A village in Bibrka urban hromada, Lviv Raion, Lviv Oblast, Ukraine, founded in 1772.
(medicine, physiology) Glucose in the blood.
(medicine, physiology) The amount of glucose in a person's blood.
(medicine) The act or process of transferring blood products into a person's circulation intravenously; an instance of it.
(figurative, uncommon) A refreshing or reinvigoration of something.
Any classification of human blood by the presence or absence of various antigens in a person’s red blood cells.
One of eight possible classifications within the ABO and Rh blood group systems, commonly used to determine a person's compatibility for blood transfusion.
An edible round berry, belonging to the cowberry group (Vaccinium sect. Cyanococcus), with flared crowns at the end, that turns blue on ripening.
The shrub of the above-mentioned berry.
(countable, and, uncountable) A dark blue colour.
A male pig.
A male guinea pig.
A brag; ostentatious positive appraisal of oneself.
Something that one brags about.
(intransitive) To brag; to talk loudly in praise of oneself.

(Buddhism) A person who has taken specific lay or monastic vows and who is on the road to perfect knowledge; specifically, one who foregoes personal nirvana in order to help others achieve enlightenment.

(Buddhism) An enlightened being existing in a form of existence beyond the ordinary forms of physical reality understood and acknowledged by scientific thought, resembling the Western notion of angels, but with a wealth of its own nuances and expectations. These include the compassionate working for enlightenment of all sentient beings.
The act of bombing, especially towns or cities.
Heavy artillery fire.
(physics) The incidence of an intense stream of high-energy particles directed at a substance.
A dessert made from ice cream frozen in a (generally spherical or hemispherical) mold.
(computing) An electromechanical device used in early cryptanalysis.
(historical) Any grenade, mortar shell, or artillery shell (hollow metal object) containing a charge that can explode.
(figurative) Something that is very surprising, shocking, amazing or sensational.
(by extension) Someone who is very attractive; a sex symbol.
A large, controlled outdoor fire lit to celebrate something or as a signal.
A fire lit outdoors to burn unwanted items; originally (historical) , heretics or other offenders, or banned books; now, generally agricultural or garden waste, or rubbish.
A striped bovine mammal found in Africa, Tragelaphus eurycerus.

examples.english: Tom plays the bongo drums.
examples.chinese: 湯姆會打邦哥鼓。

current_entries.en_definition: Either of a pair of small drums of Cuban origin, played by beating with the hands.
A strip of material used to mark a place in a book.
(computing) A record of the address of a file or Internet page, serving as a shortcut to it.
Any of various insects that infest books.
(figurative) An avid book reader.
A yokel, country bumpkin.
An uncultured person; a vulgarian.
A town having a municipal corporation and certain traditional rights.
An administrative district in some cities, e.g., London.
A geographic region of Bosnia and Herzegovina, consisting of the northern three fourths of the country.
A country in southeast Europe; in full, Bosnia and Herzegovina.
Something given liberally; a gift.

examples.english: Beauty without bounty avails naught.
examples.chinese: 沒有仁愛的美麗毫無用處

current_entries.en_definition: A reward for some specific act, especially one given by an authority or a government.
(military, historical) Money paid to a person when becoming a member of the armed forces, or as a reward for some service therein.
The string of an archer's bow.
(historical) The string of an archer's bow, as used by the Turks for strangling offenders.
A band or chain worn around the wrist as jewelry/jewellery or an ornament.

examples.english: Bracelet is the same in French.
examples.chinese: 英文"Bracelet"在法文的意思是相同的。

current_entries.en_definition: The strap of a wristwatch, used to secure it around the wrist.
A city and metropolitan borough in West Yorkshire.
An urban area in the town of Bradford West Gwillimbury, Ontario, Canada.
A state in the northeast of Germany.
A home rule city, the county seat of Meade County, Kentucky, United States.
(intransitive) To draw air into (inhale), and expel air from (exhale), the lungs in order to extract oxygen and excrete waste gases.
(intransitive) To take in needed gases and expel waste gases in a similar way.
A state of Germany, composed of the cities of Bremen and Bremerhaven.
A minor city in Muhlenberg County, Kentucky.
A number of places in the United States:
Of, from or relating to the region of Brittany, France.
A native or inhabitant of the region of Brittany, France.
The Celtic language of Brittany.
The act of offering or paying such a payment: an act of bribery.

examples.english: The mayor denied having taken a bribe.
examples.chinese: 市长否认收受了贿赂。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To give a bribe to; specifically, to ask a person to do something against their original will, in exchange for some type of reward or relief from potential trouble.
(transitive) To gain by a bribe; to induce as by a bribe.
(transitive) To cause someone to remember something from the past.
(transitive) To revive, to resurrect; to cause something dead to be alive once again.
To move something indoors, or into an area.
To introduce, add or initiate a person or group of people to an organisation; to give (someone) a share or portion of something.
The edge, margin, or border of a steep place, as of a precipice; a bank or edge.
(figurative) The edge or border.
The chest of an animal.
A cut of meat taken from the chest, especially from the section under the first five ribs.
Water in which food (meat, vegetable, etc.) has been boiled.

examples.english: There's a fly in the noodle broth.
examples.chinese: 面汤里有个苍蝇。

current_entries.en_definition: A soup made from broth and other ingredients such as vegetables, herbs or diced meat.
The state of being brothers or a brother (also figuratively).

examples.english: Their goal and activating main idea was indeed brotherhood and justice among the peoples.
examples.chinese: 他们的目标和活动的主要思想是真正的四海一家和各民族的普遍公正。

current_entries.en_definition: An association of people for any purpose, such as a society of monks; a fraternity.
